title: cheilanthes lonchophylla
intro: Cheilanthes lonchophylla, also known as the fern-leaved cliff brake, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Cheilanthes lonchophylla is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, due to its rich content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Cheilanthes lonchophylla are often dried and used as a tea or infused in hot water to extract its medicinal properties.
